# GLKTextureTarget.targetCubeMap

**Case**

The texture is a set of six textures that make up a cube map.

## Declaration

```swift
case targetCubeMap
```

## Constants

- **GLKTextureTarget.target2D**: The texture is a 2D texture.
- **GLKTextureTarget.targetCt**: The number of items in the enumeration.

items.description: The number of items in the enumeration.
